optimizations.request_coalescing: Prevents cache stampede - coalesces duplicate in-flight requests
optimizations.stale_while_revalidate: Returns stale data immediately, refreshes in background
optimizations.thundering_herd_prevention: activeRefreshes Map limits ONE background refresh at a time

/api/homepage-batch.mismatch: Frontend refetches every 30s but backend caches for 10min
/api/homepage-batch.efficiency: HIGH - Returns stale data instantly (<1ms from L1 cache), refreshes asynchronously

/api/about-batch.media_loading: Targeted - collects IDs from content, fetches specific assets
/api/about-batch.backend_caching: NONE - direct database queries every time
/api/about-batch.inefficiency: CRITICAL - Every request hits database despite batch pattern

/api/sustainability-hero.efficiency: MEDIUM - Relies on browser cache, misses server-side optimization

/api/manufacturing-hero.efficiency: GOOD - Frontend caching strategy matches backend headers

/api/technology-hero.inefficiency: No server-side caching, hits database every request

homepage.mismatch: Frontend refetches 20x more often than backend cache expires
homepage.impact: Unnecessary React Query refetches, but backend cache absorbs load
homepage.recommendation: Increase frontend staleTime to match backend (10 minutes)

about.impact: First request slow (cold DB), subsequent requests cached by React Query only
about.recommendation: Add server-side caching to about-batch endpoint

sustainability.mismatch: Frontend refetches more often than backend allows
sustainability.impact: Browser cache handles it, but inconsistent expectations

manufacturing.status: ALIGNED - frontend and backend TTLs match perfectly

cache_invalidation_analysis.current_implementation: NONE - No automatic cache invalidation on admin changes

homepage_content.trigger: Manual only (not called automatically on admin update)
homepage_content.impact: Admin changes cached for 10 minutes before visible on frontend
homepage_content.user_experience: Admin updates content, frontend shows stale data for up to 10min

other_pages.http_cache: Browser caches for 30-60 minutes without invalidation
other_pages.impact: Admin changes take 30-60 minutes to appear on frontend

homepage_batch.available_to: Developers only (not exposed to admin UI)

implementation_points: After POST/PATCH/DELETE mutations in admin routes
Broadcast invalidation to all connected clients via WebSocket (if implemented)
recommended_invalidation_strategy.example_flow: Admin updates homepage hero → PATCH /api/homepage-hero → Success → await CacheOperations.invalidateHomepage() → Next frontend request gets fresh data

database_query_patterns.storage_layer: IStorage interface with DbStorage and MemStorage implementations

query_execution.retry_logic: Not implemented at query level (handled by Replit KV for cache)

batch_query_optimization.efficiency: Homepage and About use parallel loading (GOOD), others don't

n+1_query_issues.note: Batch endpoints prevent N+1 by loading all data upfront
n+1_query_issues.media_loading: About and Manufacturing batch load media by IDs (prevents N+1)

step_1_frontend_request.trigger: Component mount or React Query refetch

step_2_http_request.headers: Cache-Control may be set for force refresh

homepage_batch.l2_check: Replit KV Database if L1 miss
homepage_batch.stale_while_revalidate: Returns stale if >80% TTL, refreshes background
homepage_batch.cold_start: Fetches from database, stores in L1+L2

other_endpoints.http_cache_only: Relies on browser/CDN caching via headers

step_8_frontend_processing.react_query_storage: Stores in React Query cache with queryKey
step_8_frontend_processing.state_update: React re-renders components with new data

cold_start_handling.issue: NEON serverless may hibernate after inactivity
cold_start_handling.first_query_delay: Potential 1-3 second delay on cold start
cold_start_handling.mitigation: UnifiedReplitCache reduces cold start impact by caching
cold_start_handling.background_refresh: Keeps cache warm even during low traffic

connection_model.disadvantage: Slightly higher latency per query vs TCP

scaling.concurrent_queries: No hardcoded limit, scales as needed
scaling.cost_model: Pay per compute time, scales down when idle

critical.issue: About page has NO server-side caching
critical.impact: Every request hits database (6 parallel queries + media fetch)

critical.issue: No cache invalidation on admin updates
critical.impact: Admin changes take 10-60 minutes to appear (cache TTL)
critical.recommendation: Call cache invalidation after successful mutations

medium.impact: Unnecessary React Query refetches (but absorbed by backend cache)
medium.recommendation: Align frontend staleTime with backend TTL
Implement targeted media loading like Manufacturing

optimizations_working_well.impact: Sub-millisecond response times from L1 cache
30min staleTime + 1hr gcTime + aggressive HTTP cache headers
Prevents cache stampede during concurrent requests

media_references.referential_integrity: WEAK - No database-level FK constraints in Drizzle schema
media_references.orphan_prevention: NOT ENFORCED - allows orphaned media files
media_references.recommendation: Add explicit FK constraints in Drizzle schema with onDelete: 'SET NULL'

/api/cache/health.provides: KV connection status, memory health, hit rate, uptime

/api/performance-monitoring.provides: Homepage batch response time, cache metrics, system health

metrics_tracked.cache_misses: Incremented on cache miss (fetch from DB)
metrics_tracked.memory_usage: Estimated from serialized cache entry sizes
metrics_tracked.evicted_entries: Count of LRU evictions due to memory pressure

memory_pressure_detection.action: Automatic eviction of oldest entries when limit exceeded

immediate_actions.action: Add server-side caching to about-batch endpoint
immediate_actions.benefit: 90% response time reduction, eliminates repeated DB queries

immediate_actions.action: Implement cache invalidation on admin mutations
immediate_actions.benefit: Admin changes appear instantly instead of 10-60 minute delay

immediate_actions.implementation: Add HTTP cache headers or UnifiedReplitCache wrapper
immediate_actions.benefit: Reduce database load for technology page

frontend_backend_alignment.action: Align frontend staleTime with backend TTLs
frontend_backend_alignment.benefit: Consistent caching behavior, fewer unnecessary refetches

frontend_backend_alignment.action: Standardize cache headers across all endpoints
frontend_backend_alignment.recommendation: Use 30min cache for stable content, 10min for dynamic

data_integrity.action: Add foreign key constraints in Drizzle schema
data_integrity.implementation: Add .references() with onDelete: 'SET NULL' for media FKs
data_integrity.benefit: Prevent broken references, enable cascade deletes

data_integrity.implementation: Add version key to cached data, invalidate on schema changes
